recipe.title: Lemon Butter Orecchiette with Burrata, Crispy Capers and Roasted Pistachios

ingredients.name: orecchiette
ingredients.note: Creator override: use orecchiette instead of spaghetti; the shell cups should catch lemon butter, burrata cream and crunch.

ingredients.name: butter
ingredients.quantity: 6 Tablespoons / 85 g plus 1 Tablespoon / 15 g for topping
ingredients.note: Browned for the lemon butter sauce; extra butter helps toast the crumb topping.

ingredients.name: lemons
ingredients.quantity: zest of 2 lemons and juice of 1 lemon
ingredients.note: Zest is a key visual and flavor cue; add extra zest at plating for sparkle.

ingredients.name: garlic
ingredients.note: Minced and bloomed briefly in brown butter without burning.

ingredients.name: extra virgin olive oil
ingredients.note: Used with butter for the crispy topping.

ingredients.name: capers
ingredients.note: Fried into salty, wrinkled pops inside the crumb topping.

ingredients.name: roasted pistachios
ingredients.note: Creator-added topping and supplemental recipe step: roast until fragrant, then chop for green crunch.

ingredients.name: grated parmesan cheese
ingredients.note: Toasts into the crumb mix and finishes the plate.

ingredients.name: dry thyme or herbes de Provence
ingredients.note: Herbal flecks in the crunchy topping.

ingredients.name: burrata cheese
ingredients.note: Food-porn creamy center; tear just before serving.

ingredients.name: salt and black pepper
ingredients.note: Use visible black pepper crack at the end.

ingredients.name: reserved pasta water
ingredients.quantity: 1/2 cup / 120 ml, plus more if needed
ingredients.note: Emulsifies the brown butter lemon sauce around the orecchiette.

steps.text: Roast pistachios in a dry pan until fragrant, then chop into irregular crunchy green pieces.
steps.visualCue: pistachios jump and darken at the edges, then scatter into emerald chunks
steps.textureCue: dry toasted snap, oily green nut interior, coarse chopped crunch
steps.runwayRisk: pistachios can drift into generic herbs unless scale and chopped-nut texture are explicit

steps.text: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil; cook orecchiette until al dente and reserve 1/2 cup pasta water.
steps.visualCue: small ear-shaped shells tumble in rolling water and scoop starch bubbles
steps.textureCue: firm orecchiette cups, glossy starch water, steam
steps.runwayRisk: model may revert to spaghetti from source if orecchiette override is not locked

steps.text: Toast breadcrumbs, capers, thyme, parmesan, chili flakes and roasted pistachios in butter and olive oil until crispy and golden.
steps.visualCue: gold crumb sand, wrinkled capers, green pistachio shards and red pepper flakes scrape across the pan
steps.textureCue: dry sandy crunch, salty caper pops, hard pistachio crackle
steps.runwayRisk: crumb topping can look like loose dust unless quantity and coarse grains are visible

steps.text: Brown diced butter in a skillet until foaming and nutty amber.
steps.visualCue: butter foam collapses into amber liquid with brown milk solids
steps.textureCue: shiny foam, amber fat, nutty speckles
steps.runwayRisk: butter can burn black or stay pale if color target is not specified

steps.text: Add minced garlic for one minute, then add lemon juice and zest and turn off heat.
steps.visualCue: garlic blooms in amber butter, lemon juice hisses, zest threads flash yellow
steps.textureCue: sizzle, citrus steam, thin glossy sauce
steps.runwayRisk: garlic may char if the one-minute bloom and no-burn policy are absent

steps.text: Add reserved pasta water, orecchiette and remaining butter; toss until the sauce emulsifies and coats every shell.
steps.visualCue: orecchiette shells flip through glossy lemon butter and catch sauce in their centers
steps.textureCue: silky emulsion, elastic toss, glossy shell cups
steps.runwayRisk: sauce may split or become soup unless viscosity is locked

steps.text: Serve pasta in a shallow bowl and tear burrata over the hot orecchiette so the cream spills into the shells.
steps.visualCue: burrata skin opens and thick white cream ribbons over yellow glossy pasta
steps.textureCue: taut mozzarella skin, thick stracciatella cream, hot pasta gloss
steps.runwayRisk: burrata can become a generic melted cheese blob without torn-skin and cream-center reference

steps.text: Finish with crispy caper-pistachio crumbs, basil, black pepper, parmesan and extra lemon zest.
steps.visualCue: crunch rains over burrata cream; basil leaves, pepper specks and lemon zest land on top
steps.textureCue: crunch against cream, green herbs, yellow zest, black pepper speckles
steps.runwayRisk: tiny garnish drift can under-render the pistachio and caper crunch

assumptions: The pasta amount remains the source yield of 1 lb / 454 g for 4 servings, but the shape is changed to orecchiette per creator instruction.
Use about 1/3 cup chopped pistachios so the topping is visually readable without overwhelming the burrata.
The final plate shows one generous shallow bowl of orecchiette with a torn burrata ball, not four separate servings.
The main food-porn destructive beat is the burrata tear and cream spill; the segment before the standardized outro resolves to a motionless final hero state.
No paid generation services are called; recipe-specific references are only planned for Recipe2Video to generate later.
criticalTransformations: Raw pistachios become fragrant roasted chunks with visible green interiors and toasted brown edges.
Breadcrumbs, capers, parmesan, thyme, chili and pistachios become a coarse golden crunchy topping rather than powder.
Butter browns from pale foam to amber liquid with nutty speckles without burning black.
Garlic blooms briefly in brown butter before lemon juice and zest stop the cooking.
Reserved pasta water turns brown butter and lemon into a silky emulsion that clings to orecchiette cups.
Burrata tears open into thick white stracciatella cream that spills over hot pasta.
Crunch, basil, parmesan, pepper and lemon zest land visibly on the creamy final dish.
visualTextureOpportunities: Extreme macro of pistachio and panko crunch raining over a glossy orecchiette shell.
Caper-panko scrape in the pan: dry sandy sound, wrinkled capers and green pistachio shards.
Brown butter foam collapsing into amber gloss with tiny toasted milk solids.
Lemon juice hitting hot butter with a quick hiss and citrus steam.
Orecchiette shells flipping and catching sauce inside their ear-shaped cups.
Burrata skin splitting and thick cream ribboning into lemon butter pasta.
Fresh basil and lemon zest landing on white cream, yellow pasta and green pistachio crunch.
Final black pepper crack over a motionless, glossy, indulgent bowl.
possibleHooks: Crunch shower hits glossy orecchiette and burrata cream before revealing the roasted pistachio-caper topping.
Burrata tears open in slow, creamy ribbons over lemon butter orecchiette, followed immediately by a crunchy pistachio rain.
Brown butter turns amber, lemon hisses in, and orecchiette shells flip through the glossy sauce.
Pistachios roast, capers crisp and the topping scrapes like golden sand before it lands on burrata.
